subcategory: Feature showcase with tabbed interface and animated reveal
use_cases: Displaying product features with interactive tab navigation for SaaS landing pages
Showcasing software capabilities with animated visual reveals on user interaction
Creating engaging feature comparisons for SEO or analytics tools
ai_summary: An interactive feature showcase component with tabbed navigation and animated radial gradient mask reveals. Uses framer-motion for smooth transitions as users switch between feature tabs, displaying icons, titles, and descriptions in a clean card-based layout. Ideal for SaaS product pages and software feature demonstrations.
